description: Analyse cash flow statements — CFO, CFI, CFF — using direct and indirect methods, convert indirect to direct, and derive free cash flow and cash flow ratios

cfo_methods.direct_method: Reports cash receipts from customers and cash paid to suppliers/employees
cfo_methods.indirect_method: Starts from net income; adjusts for non-cash items and working capital changes
cfo_methods.conversion: Indirect to direct: restate each line using changes in related receivables/payables

classification.cfo_ifrs_flexibility: Interest and dividends paid/received can be CFO or CFF/CFI under IFRS
classification.cfo_gaap_rigid: US GAAP requires interest paid and interest/dividends received in CFO

free_cash_flow.interpretation: Cash available to equity holders after reinvestment and debt service

cash_flow_ratios.cfo_to_debt: CFO / total debt — debt service capacity

sources_uses_analysis.positive_cfo_indicator: Mature business with strong cash generation
sources_uses_analysis.negative_cfo_growth: Growth firms may show negative CFO during scaling
sources_uses_analysis.cff_as_funding: Persistent negative CFO + positive CFF signals dependency on external funding

analyze_cash_flow.description: Produce CFO quality, FCF, and cash flow ratios

errors.message: entity_id, period, and cfo are required

anti_patterns.rule: Do not treat strong CFO as proof of earnings quality alone
anti_patterns.why: One-time working capital releases and aggressive factoring can flatter CFO; inspect trend and composition

anti_patterns.rule: Do not compare FCF across firms without consistent capex classification
anti_patterns.why: Some classify maintenance capex only; others full capex — produce apples-to-apples before ranking

anti_patterns.rule: Do not ignore IFRS/GAAP classification differences
anti_patterns.why: Interest and dividend placement between CFO and CFF/CFI affects CFO margins and ratios materially

anti_patterns.rule: Do not convert indirect to direct without receivables/payables detail
anti_patterns.why: Required accruals schedule is often missing; estimates may understate cash collection risk

goals.description: Analyse cash flow statements — CFO, CFI, CFF — using direct and indirect methods, convert indirect to direct, and derive free cash flow and cash flow ratios

success_metrics.measurement: All decisions have complete audit trails

constraints.description: All operations must be auditable and traceable

tradeoffs.reason: trading operations require precise execution and full audit trails

invariants: error messages never expose internal system details
